source_verification_note: industry_sources entries indicate the published works that informed or directionally support each lever's savings range. Where no external benchmark was found, INTERNAL_CALIBRATION is noted. All cited sources are real publications; specific savings percentages remain internal calibrations unless the source directly cites a matching range.

condition_precedents: IoT / vibration sensors installed on critical assets (OEE impact > ₹1 Cr/year downtime risk)
CMMS / EAM updated with asset criticality classifications (A/B/C)
Maintenance technician training on condition-based protocols completed
industry_sources: McKinsey & Company — Why Zero-Based Budgeting Makes Sense Again (mckinsey.com/capabilities/operations/our-insights/why-zero-based-budgeting-makes-sense-again)
Deloitte — Real Estate Predictions 2025 (deloitte.com/insights/real-estate)
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — no verified external benchmark found. Savings range is internal consulting estimate.
